component.name: KPix
component.summary: Pixel art editor for still images and animations

description.p: KPix is a pixel art editor for still images and animations with a focus on generative color ramps and shading.

ul.li: Generative color ramps based on parameters
Reference, grid/perspective, shading and dithering layers
Non-destructive layer effects (outer/inner strokes, shadow, glow, ...)
Image import including automatic palette creation
Image export including layers to Aseprite, Pixelorama, Gimp and Photoshop
